extName.message: DeBait – Thumbnail YouTube asli, bukan umpan klik
extName.description: Extension name / store title (shown in browser and store).

extDescription.message: Otomatis mengganti thumbnail umpan klik YouTube dengan frame pertama asli video. Ringan, privat, tanpa pengaturan.
extDescription.description: Short description (manifest; Chrome caps at 132 chars).
